characterTypes.role: Party boss who hired the player to draw the map in their party's favour
characterTypes.palette: party gold (#d4a017) and red (#c0392b) accents; shared dark outline (#1a1a2e)
characterTypes.silhouetteNotes: Wide-shouldered power-broker suit jacket with visible lapels; strong hat brim or distinctive hair; props: flag or clenched fist; political-cartoon bravado

characterTypes.role: Federal judge evaluating whether the map meets constitutional requirements
characterTypes.palette: slate blue (#4a6fa5) accent; formal dark robe; shared dark outline (#1a1a2e)
characterTypes.silhouetteNotes: Judicial robe with wide collar; gavel as recurring prop; formal upright bearing; authority conveyed through posture not bulk

characterTypes.role: Both party bosses side by side, evaluating whether the map is fair to both sides
characterTypes.palette: left boss warm-red (#c0392b); right boss cool-blue (#2980b9); shared dark outline (#1a1a2e)
characterTypes.silhouetteNotes: Two smaller figures at half-width each within the 200x200 viewBox; mirror-image postures; opposing accent colours make them visually symmetric

characterTypes.role: Reform commission evaluating whether the map meets neutral fairness criteria
characterTypes.palette: teal (#16a085) and muted green (#27ae60) accents; shared dark outline (#1a1a2e)
characterTypes.silhouetteNotes: Business-casual attire; clipboard or balance-scale as prop; earnest civic-minded bearing; less imposing than Partisan Boss

characterTypes.role: Supervisor / tutorial guide assessing the player's work on training exercises
characterTypes.palette: muted grey-blue (#7f8c8d / #a0b4c8) accents; shared dark outline (#1a1a2e)
characterTypes.silhouetteNotes: Plain office attire; clipboard or checklist as prop; no political symbols; approachable and professional, not intimidating

starStates.label: Three-star (ecstatic)
starStates.poseGuide: Open, expansive, celebratory — arms raised high or spread wide, leaning forward into the viewer, big visible gesture, wide grin or triumphant expression

starStates.label: Two-star (satisfied)
starStates.poseGuide: Positive, composed — thumbs up or approving nod, upright confident posture, relaxed slight smile

starStates.label: One-star (disappointed)
starStates.poseGuide: Reserved, ambivalent — slight lean, crossed arms or a restrained shrug, neutral or slightly downturned expression, subdued or absent gesture

starStates.label: Zero-star (furious / despairing)
starStates.poseGuide: Closed, negative — hunched or turned slightly away, disapproving gesture (fist, head in hands, or dismissive wave), clear frown or scowl
